$comment: Single source of truth for scheduled automations. SHIPS OFF: `enabled` is false. Turn the whole layer on by setting it true; turn one automation on/off with its own `enabled`. Env AUTOMATIONS_ENABLED=0 hard-kills everything regardless. See automations/README.md.

automations.description: Trace/coverage/eval freshness + OpenSpec/handoff hygiene. Deterministic; a cheap summary is added only when something is red.
npm audit + outdated check; a cheap summary of actionable highs only when there are findings.
On a red CI run, one cheap agent reads the failed log, hypothesizes a cause, and proposes a next step.
OPT-IN ($). Re-grade a sample of eval cases to catch quality drift the ratchet only sees on regeneration.
OPT-IN ($$). Bounded review-gate sweep over a sampled slice; findings surface as tasks/issues only, never fixes.
